sources.quotedText: Mamie Lake (Lake Mamie, Mono Co.). Last Sat. in Apr. through Nov. 15. 5 trout

395 Guide — Lake Mamie Fishing (Mammoth Lakes, California)
California Fish and Game Code §7145 — Sport Fishing License Requirement
sources.quotedText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

sources.quotedText: {"gaz_id":263137,"gaz_name":"Lake Mamie","gaz_featureclass":"Lake","fcode":39004,"state_alpha":"CA","county_name":"Mono"}; geometry (Web Mercator -13248184.6327, 4524235.5749) converts to lon -119.010467, lat 37.608279, matching the file's recorded coordinate (-119.0107, 37.6082) to within ~30m.

regulations.humanSummary: Open last Saturday in April through November 15
regulations.verbatimText: Last Sat. in Apr. through Nov. 15.

parameters.counting_rule: 5 trout daily bag limit; this special regulation entry does not specify a distinct possession limit.

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...

stockingSchedule.note: CDFW's 2026 Provisional Stocking Document for Trout and Inland Salmon lists Mamie Lake (Region 6, Mono Co.) for catchable-size Rainbow Trout under the Put and Take program, with a stated release month range of April-November. This is CDFW's provisional plan for 2026, not a guaranteed annual constant.
